name: memewatch
description: Solana memecoin watchlist bot - gates, scoring, state machine, live dashboard

scripts.test: node --test dist/paper/execution.test.js dist/paper/quote-status.test.js dist/paper/persistence-health.test.js dist/market/helius-trade-backfill.test.js dist/model/feeder-health.test.js dist/api/bestbuys.test.js dist/scoring/score.test.js dist/scoring/states.test.js dist/scoring/conviction.test.js dist/tuning/snapshots.test.js dist/model/model.test.js
